items: ReCue now runs on Linux — Arch, Ubuntu, and Mint are fully supported (best-effort on other distributions), shipped as a self-updating AppImage. Shortcuts use Ctrl, and "Reveal in File Manager" opens your desktop's file browser.

Terminals on Linux are much faster: ReCue works around a graphics issue on NVIDIA drivers and virtual machines, skips GPU rendering when only a software rasterizer is available, and batches terminal output — fixing laggy typing, slow screen updates, and slow startup.
Reconnecting sessions at startup is quicker on every platform thanks to a leaner scrollback transfer.
